dict.key: Privacy - Health Share Usage Description Privacy - Health Share Usage Description
dict.string: Seizcare reads heart rate, oxygen saturation, and sleep data to detect potential seizure risk patterns and provide health insights. Seizcare reads heart rate, oxygen saturation, and sleep data to detect potential seizure risk patterns and provide health insights. Seizcare reads heart rate, oxygen saturation, and sleep data to detect potential seizure risk patterns and provide health insights. dict.key: Privacy - Health Update Usage Description Privacy - Health Update Usage Description Privacy - Health Update Usage Description Privacy - Health Update Usage Description Privacy - Health Update Usage Descripption
dict.string: Seizcare may store detected seizure events in Healthkit to maintain accurate health records.
